scene.message: Ayase: Yaaay!{nl} Then Ayase's betting on Brown!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I shall place my bet{nl} on Brown as well.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: What? What is it?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Hey! Nanjo, Yukino,{nl} which side are you two on?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Hmph. Utter nonsense.{nl} Count me out.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Same here...{nl} Do whatever you want.{waitkey}{ret}
So, which will it be?{nl} {ctl0e:25}{ret}
Ayase: Aww, man...{nl} you're gonna regret this~{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Okay, here we go~{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Just hurry up and go!{nl} All-you-can-eat, baby!{waitkey}{ret}

Brown: Alright, here it comes!{nl} .{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.{wait_fr:16}.uh, huh?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: H-hey, Inaba...{nl} Behind you... take a look.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: What is it.{nl} Too late to back out now...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Gah!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Wh-what is this...{nl} A-are you serious?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Last time it was only a sound.{nl} How surprising.{waitkey}{ret}
Pale girl: ...hic ...sob{nl} {wait_fr:88}Help me... help me...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Wh-what the!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Wha? Th-this is...!?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Fantastic!{nl} This grows more intriguing!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Kyaa! What is iiit!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Everyone, be careful!{nl} Kya!?{waitkey}{ret}
{color:2}Uesugi Hidehiko. A.K.A. Brown.{nl} An attention-seeking show-off.{color:0}{waitkey}{ret}
